decision.title: Use agentdocs and scope-local decision ledgers for agentic collaboration docs
decision.chosen: Agentic collaboration docs use agentdocs/cursor.md as the entrypoint, agentdocs/requirements for living capability requirements, dated files under agentdocs/plans only for active implementation episodes, and agentdocs/tasking only for cursor-linked execution graphs. Durable decisions live in DECISIONS.xml at the narrowest owning scope: the repo root for repo-wide choices and package roots for package-owned choices.
decision.rationale: This keeps the active working tree small while preserving durable rationale in body-immutable ledgers. Package-local ledgers avoid a central decision pile in this monorepo, and package README files remain the public behavior authority.

rejected.option: A central docs index mixed active routing, historical plans, decisions, and archive records. It made completed plans appear current and required manual index maintenance.

An archive directory keeps obsolete working records discoverable but also keeps them in the active collaboration surface. Durable rationale belongs in DECISIONS.xml; completed plan and tasking records are disposable after promotion.

option.name: Single root ledger for every package

rejected.option: A single root ledger hides package ownership. Package-owned decisions are easier to discover and maintain beside the package that owns the behavior.

decision.non-goals: This decision does not define package public APIs, replace package README files, or require documentation for one-shot work that has no durable collaboration value.
decision.revisit: Revisit only if the monorepo gains a different package boundary model or a tool enforces another agentic documentation layout.
